title: × tripleurothemis maleolens
intro: × Tripleurothemis maleolens, also known as the 'False Squirrel Tail', is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of × tripleurothemis maleolens include its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of × tripleurothemis maleolens can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
